case_title: 155 MONTGOMERY STREET ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. SAN FRANCISCO MERCHANT SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MERCHANT SERVICES A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
